description: Letter from Yosef b. Maḥfūẓ to the Nagid Shemuel b. Ḥananya. Reporting on Abū Saʿīd Ibn Fistiqa. The sender had obtained a rescript (tawqīʿ) exempting him from the capitation tax. The faqīh and chief justice (qāḍī l-quḍāt) and "all the Muslims" got angry about this. The sender goes on to complain about Abū Saʿīd's subsequent behavior toward him. It seems that he denounced (ghamzaz) the ḥaver Yeshuʿa to the tax officials. The letter is rich with further details about capitation tax politics merits further examination. (Information from Goitein's index cards)
